<!--
  Thanks for contributing to react-ethiopian-calendar!
  Please fill out the sections below and complete the quality-gate checklist.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing public API/props)
- [ ] Refactor / internal change (no public API change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Quality gates

<!-- All boxes should be checked before requesting review. CI runs these on Node 18/20/22. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (tsc --noEmit, strict)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (typescript-eslint, no warnings)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (vitest)
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` maintained or improved (no regression in coverage)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (ESM + CJS + types + CSS)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior (incl. regression tests for fixed bugs)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / JSDoc / types) where applicable
- [ ] Public API and props are unchanged, OR breaking changes are documented above

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, include before/after screenshots or a short clip. -->

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know. -->
